description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a light beige and white exterior, surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and several trees. The front features a driveway leading to a garage, a set of steps up to a small porch, and a prominent entryway. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, allowing ample natural light inside. The backyard includes a children's swing set and additional green space, while the side yard has a paved path and more landscaping. The roof is mostly flat with a small raised section, and the property is bordered by paved walkways and grass. The overall design is modern with clean lines and functional outdoor areas.
description: A modern two-story beige and white house with a garage, porch, large windows, and landscaped yard featuring trees and a swing set.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entry steps, porch, and two prominent trees in the landscaped yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, paved driveway, and a clear view of the backyard swing set and additional green space.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back porch, symmetrical windows, and a large open lawn with a swing set to the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main entry steps, porch, and a clear look at the swing set and side landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with steps, small porch, and a single front door flanked by windows
